name: example
description: Example workflow template -- copy and modify for your own workflows

steps.name: Research Phase
steps.description: Research the topic and compile findings
steps.input: Research [topic] and summarize key findings in 3-5 bullet points

steps.name: Draft Content
steps.description: Use the research to draft content
steps.input: Using the research findings from step 1, draft a [deliverable type]

steps.name: Distribute
steps.description: Send the final content through the appropriate channel
